description: Create a content slide with a sidebar-left layout on global population structure, featuring a population-pyramid style mirrored horizontal bar chart for World, Africa, and Europe plus a right-side bullet summary.

header.headline: The global population pyramid is becoming visibly sturdier in all regions except Africa, the region with the highest share of a younger population
header.sub: Distribution of the world's population by age and sex in % of population, 2020

main.title: Population pyramids by region
main.body: Mirrored population pyramids compare 2020 and 2050 age structure across World, Africa, and Europe, split by male and female. Legend distinguishes ages 0–19, 20–64, and 65+ for both years.

items.text: World population structure is becoming more rectangular over time, indicating ageing across both sexes.
Africa remains the youngest region, with a comparatively broad base of ages 0–19.
Europe shows the oldest profile, with a larger share of ages 65+ and a narrower youth cohort.
